scientific_interpretation: The selected German ASR/timing route is not stable enough on the participant-disjoint development subset to support a credible continuous utterance-frame alignment measurement. This is a model-model measurement failure, not human validation, ground truth, a causal null, or evidence against synchronized side modalities.
not_run_because_of_ordered_stop: development matched shuffled and time-shifted controls
synchronized, shuffled, shifted, uninformative, or absent side-cue learner training

permitted_future_options: Retain only model-independent ChildLens distribution calibration under a separately scoped protocol.
Obtain authorized qualified German validation and freeze a new measurement protocol.
Preregister exactly one new ASR/alignment route in a new protocol without post-hoc model shopping.
Consider staged ChildLens expansion only for a predeclared identifiability or K-safe aggregation need.
